allow: Bash(node -e "require\(''reflect-metadata''\); const { Utilities } = require\(''@criticalmanufacturing/connect-iot-controller-engine''\); [''activate'', ''activateIn'', ''myInputIn'', ''myInput'', ''nameIn'', ''name''].forEach\(n => console.log\(''inputToProperty\('' + n + ''\):'', Utilities.inputToProperty\(n\)\)\); [''success'', ''error'', ''myOutput'', ''result'', ''name''].forEach\(n => console.log\(''propertyToOutput\('' + n + ''\):'', Utilities.propertyToOutput\(n\)\)\);")
